byMarion Rodriguez



SHASTA COUNTY, Calif. —The Special Olympics Shasta County (SOSC) will be hosting two events over the weekend for persons with intellectual disabilities.

According to their Facebook post, a dinner and dance will be held on Friday, Sept. 20 from 6-8:30 p.m. at the Frontier Senior Center in Anderson.On Saturday, Sept. 21 they will be holding a bowling tournament at Shasta Lanes starting at 8:30 a.m.

SOSC said lunch will be provided for all athletes and volunteers, and medals will be awarded later in the day.

These events come on the heels of some more fun where the athletes competed at the Yuba city regional softball competition earning silver medals.

The Northstate's NewsNazy Javidcongratulated the teams on Daybreak.

For more information, you can visit the Special Olympics Shasta County Facebook pagehere.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
